title: India's Experience with GM Crops: Socio-Economic Impacts and Institutional Challenges
summary: India's Experience with GM Crops: Socio-Economic Impacts and Institutional Challenges
body: Presented at Workshop on Agricultural Biotechnology for Development: Institutional Challenges and Socio-economic Issues in Bellagio, Italy, 30 May - 1 June, 2005 Note This paper is a draft for comment, not for citation.
